action_text: Click the list search magnifier to run the current search
rationale: We’ve typed a query in the list search field; executing it may quickly filter to reports with titles matching “incidents by,” helping us find the report that shows incidents by assignee.

action_text: Press Enter in the list search field to execute the search
rationale: Running the search from the list search field should apply the Title filter; this may reveal “Incidents by Assigned to” or similar.

action_text: Type "Assigned to" in the list search field
rationale: Searching for the phrase “Assigned to” is likely to find the report that counts incidents per assignee/agent.

action_text: Type "Incident" into the list search field
rationale: Broadening the search to “Incident” can surface all Incident-related reports, after which we can refine to find the one grouped by assignee.

action_text: Click the "Table" column header to sort by table
rationale: Sorting by the Table column can group items by table so we can quickly navigate to reports on the Incident [incident] table and then locate the one by assignee.
